CustomField.description: Number of months into the future for which NPPatch creates installment Opportunities on open-ended Recurring Donations. Default is 12. WARNING: Reducing this value causes existing future Opportunities beyond the new window to be deleted. Increasing it triggers a batch process to create additional Opportunities. Changes take effect on the next batch run or Recurring Donation edit.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Months of future installment Opportunities to create for open-ended Recurring Donations. Default is 12. Reducing this value deletes excess future Opportunities.
CustomField.label: Opportunity Forecast Months
